query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `auditLogs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`action` enum('order_create','order_update','order_delete','user_role_update','user_status_update','user_delete','data_import','customer_create','customer_update','customer_delete','teacher_create','teacher_update','teacher_delete','schedule_create','schedule_update','schedule_delete') NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`userName` varchar(100),
	`userRole` varchar(20),
	`targetType` varchar(50),
	`targetId` int,
	`targetName` varchar(200),
	`description` text NOT NULL,
	`changes` json,
	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	`userAgent` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `auditLogs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)
